canonical_question: What are Dynamics 365 F&O and Business Central Web API (OData v4) capabilities and rate limits?
aliases: Dynamics 365 Finance Operations OData API rate limits
Dynamics 365 Business Central API v2.0 capabilities
D365 F&O service protection API limits
Dynamics 365 Web API throttling and retry-after behavior
D365 OData v4 endpoints and query options

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: 10.0.36 (2024) - User-based service protection limits removed as mandatory; now optional

constraints: F&O: 6,000 API requests per 5-minute sliding window per user per web server
F&O: 52 max concurrent requests per user per web server
F&O: 1,200 seconds (20 min) combined execution time per 5-minute window per user
F&O: OData page size capped at 10,000 records per page
F&O: $expand supports only first-level expansion (no nested $expand)
BC: 5 max concurrent OData requests per user (with 95 in queue)
BC: 6,000 OData requests per 5-minute sliding window per user
BC: 10-minute max execution time per request (504 Gateway Timeout)
BC: Max OData $batch size of 100 operations per request
BC: Max page size of 20,000 entities per OData response

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs Dynamics 365 Dataverse/CRM Web API (not F&O or BC)
User needs Dual Write configuration between F&O and Dataverse
User needs DMF/DIXF file-based import/export for large data migration
User needs Virtual Entities to access F&O data from Power Platform
User needs Dynamics 365 authentication flow details

related_to.label: Dataverse Web API capabilities and limits
Data Management Framework for file-based import/export

solves.label: Dual Write real-time sync between F&O and Dataverse

alternative_to.label: Virtual Entities for cross-platform data access

often_confused_with.label: Dataverse Web API (different product, different limits)

inputs_needed.question: What integration pattern do you need?
